name: Creamy Carob Squares
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Ricotta cheese or low-fat cottage cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients to form a crumb mixture. Set aside.
2. Beat together the remaining ingredients.
3. Place half of the crumb mixture in an oiled 9-inch x 12-inch pan, pressing down well.
4. Cover with carob mixture.
5. Top with the remaining crumb mixture.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until golden.
7. Cool and cut into squares.
Suggestion: If the crumb mixture does not stick together, add a little oil.
